definition: Every session/day/week follows: Accumulation → Manipulation → Distribution. This is the Market Maker's algorithm.
depends_on: liquidity (accumulation BUILDS liquidity, manipulation SWEEPS it)
sessions_and_kill_zones (sessions determine WHEN each phase occurs)
feeds_into: liquidity_sweep (manipulation phase IS a liquidity sweep)
judas_swing (the manipulation move IS often a judas swing)
related_to: market_maker_model (MMM is PO3 applied with premium/discount + structure)
dealing_range (daily PO3 creates the daily dealing range)
bridge_integration: PO3 is detected per-cycle and surfaced to Claude as both prompt context and synergy input. (1) Detection: bridge/ict_pipeline.py:733-737 calls analysis.ict.core.detect_po3_phase(session_slice, daily_bias=direction) on the last 20 M15 bars (~5h slice of the current session); the resulting PO3Phase enum value (one of 'accumulation', 'manipulation', 'distribution', 'unknown' — defined in trading-ai-v2/analysis/ict/core.py:225-233) lands on SymbolAnalysis.po3_phase. (2) Confluence factor: ict_pipeline.py:1121-1122 inserts 'PO3_<phase>' (e.g. 'PO3_distribution') at the front of advanced_factors so Wyckoff alignment checks can match the substring. (3) Prompt injection: bridge/concept_injector.py:225-237 ALWAYS injects power_of_three_and_AMD into the Claude prompt (treated as universal framework, not optional), with the current phase string ('Current phase: distribution', etc.). claude_decision.py:227-240 _build_layer_narrative also adds explicit per-phase guidance using session_type as a proxy ('asian'→accumulation→'DO NOT TRADE', 'london'→manipulation→'DO NOT CHASE', 'overlap'/'ny'→distribution→'Enter retracements'). claude_decision.py:295-297 surfaces a concrete conflict line when displacement is confirmed during an Asian session ('Displacement in accumulation phase — distribution hasn't started. Wait for kill zone.'). (4) Synergies: synergy_scorer.py:114-117 _in_distribution_phase uses session_type (substrings 'ny' or 'overlap'), NOT po3_phase — this is a deliberate proxy. The synergies 'Kill zone + PO3 distribution phase' (+6, line 365) and 'CISD + PO3 phase transition' (+5, line 371) fire on this. The 'Wyckoff/PO3 alignment' synergy (synergy_scorer.py:313-336, line 462) requires the literal substrings 'po3_distribution' + 'mm_' (Market Maker Model) OR 'po3_manipulation' + 'judasswing' to be present in advanced_factors — both pathways add +4. (5) Phase-specific entry rule reinforcement: claude_decision.py:1083-1094 in _post_gate doesn't currently include a PO3-accumulation phrase gate (the comment at line 1071 mentions 'PO3-accumulation' as a target case but the active phrase tuple at lines 1072-1097 covers only self-downgrade phrases — see feedback_reasoning_self_contradiction.md for which phrases survived calibration). The 'do not trade in accumulation' / 'do not chase manipulation' enforcement is therefore prompt-only, not a hard post-gate. Daily and weekly PO3 patterns from this card (Mon-Tue accumulation, Wed manipulation, Thu-Fri distribution; daily-candle PO3) are NOT detected programmatically — they are informational context for Claude. The intraday AMD time windows (09:50-10:10, 10:50-11:10, 14:00-15:00) ARE represented in synergy_scorer.py:191-211 _ALGO_TIMES with a ±10 minute window, contributing to the 'Algo timing + displacement' (+4, line 438) and 'Macro time + displacement' synergies.

accumulation.what: Smart money builds positions. Sideways, choppy. Retail places breakout orders above/below.
accumulation.creates: liquidity — the breakout orders and stops that accumulate ARE the liquidity for step 3 of the sweep
accumulation.when: Asian session (7 PM - 2 AM ET) or pre-London
accumulation.trading_rule: DO NOT TRADE. This is NOT a signal, it's preparation.

manipulation.what: Sharp fake move sweeping accumulated liquidity. Price breaks the range to trigger stops.
manipulation.IS: A liquidity_sweep in disguise. The manipulation IS the sweep of the liquidity built in accumulation.
manipulation.creates: The sweep extreme (which becomes your SL reference) + trapped traders who provide fuel for distribution
manipulation.when: London open (2-5 AM ET) or 10:00 AM ET
manipulation.trading_rule: DO NOT CHASE. This move is designed to look like a breakout. It is the TRAP.
manipulation.confirmation_via: SMT_divergence — if correlated instrument does NOT confirm the 'breakout', it's manipulation

distribution.what: The real move. After manipulation takes liquidity, price moves to the true target.
distribution.IS: displacement in the real direction. Distribution starts WITH displacement candles creating FVGs and OBs.
distribution.creates: FVGs (entry zones) + OBs (entry zones) + BOS/CHoCH (structure confirmation)
distribution.when: After manipulation completes. NY session 10:30 AM - 2:00 PM ET typically.
distribution.trading_rule: THIS is when you trade — but enter the RETRACEMENT into the FVG/OB, not the displacement itself.

daily_candle_PO3: Daily open = accumulation reference. Daily low (bullish) or high (bearish) = manipulation. Daily close = distribution result.
weekly_PO3: Mon-Tue = accumulation. Wed = manipulation (weekly high/low often forms). Thu-Fri = distribution.
